name: Distribution Solutions Group, Inc.
summary: Distribution Solutions Group, Inc. (DSGR) is a diversified industrial distribution company. It operates through multiple segments providing products and services to various industrial end markets. The company faces competition across its markets and has significant operations including international activities. DSGR has grown partly through acquisitions and manages distribution of industrial products to governmental, commercial, and industrial customers.
